BIH-QAT.summary: Bosnia-Herzegovina is 3rd with 4 points, likely advancing. Qatar is eliminated in 4th place with 1 point.

SUI-CAN.summary: Switzerland is 1st with 7 points, qualified. Canada is 2nd with 4 points, also qualified for knockout stage.

MAR-HAI.summary: Morocco needs a win or draw to secure automatic qualification. Haiti needs a massive win for any slim hope of advancing.

SCO-BRA.summary: Scotland needs a win for automatic qualification. Brazil needs a win or draw to secure their spot in the knockout stage.

CZE-MEX.summary: Mexico is already qualified and playing for group winner seeding. Czechia needs a win and help for a slim chance to advance.

RSA-KOR.summary: South Korea needs a win to guarantee automatic qualification. South Africa needs a win and help for a slim chance to advance.

CUW-CIV.summary: Curaçao needs a win for any slim hope of 3rd place; a draw or loss eliminates them. Ivory Coast seeks top-2.

ECU-GER.summary: Ecuador needs a win and goal difference swing for top-2, or a draw for 3rd. Germany is already qualified.

JPN-SWE.summary: Japan and Sweden both need a win to guarantee top-2, or a draw for a strong 3rd place chance.

TUN-NED.summary: Tunisia is eliminated. Netherlands needs a draw to guarantee top-2, or a win for 1st place.

PAR-AUS.summary: Paraguay and Australia both need a win to secure top-2 or a strong 3rd place spot.

TUR-USA.summary: Türkiye is eliminated. United States is already qualified, playing for group seeding.

NOR-FRA.summary: Both teams are already qualified for the knockout stage. This match determines who finishes first in Group I.

SEN-IRQ.summary: Both teams are eliminated from advancing. A win secures third place but is insufficient for qualification.

CPV-KSA.summary: Cape Verde needs a win for a realistic chance at top two or best third. Saudi Arabia must win to avoid elimination.

URU-ESP.summary: Spain needs a draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Uruguay must win to guarantee a top-two spot.

EGY-IRN.summary: Egypt needs a draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Iran must win to guarantee a top-two spot.

NZL-BEL.summary: Belgium needs a win to guarantee top-two qualification. New Zealand must win to avoid elimination.

CAN-BIH.summary: Canada has already advanced as group runner-up. Bosnia-Herzegovina needs to be among the best eight third-place teams.

USA-PAR.summary: USA has qualified, competing for first place. Paraguay needs a win or draw to secure automatic qualification or a strong third-place spot.

QAT-SUI.summary: Switzerland has already qualified for the next round. Qatar is already eliminated from the tournament.

BRA-MAR.summary: Brazil and Morocco have both already qualified for the next round of the tournament.

HAI-SCO.summary: Haiti and Scotland are both already eliminated from the tournament, with no path to advance.

AUS-TUR.summary: Australia needs a win for top-two or a draw for a strong third-place chance; Türkiye is already eliminated.

GER-CUW.summary: Germany is already qualified and playing for group winner seeding; Curaçao is already eliminated.

NED-JPN.summary: Both teams need a win or draw to guarantee top-two qualification and secure group winner seeding.

CIV-ECU.summary: Ivory Coast needs a win for top-two or a draw for a strong third-place chance; Ecuador needs a win to advance.

SWE-TUN.summary: Sweden needs a win to guarantee top-two qualification or a draw for a strong third-place chance; Tunisia is eliminated.

ESP-CPV.summary: Spain needs a win or draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Cape Verde needs a win to advance automatically.

BEL-EGY.summary: Egypt needs a win or draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Belgium needs a win to advance automatically.

KSA-URU.summary: Uruguay needs a win to guarantee top-two qualification. Saudi Arabia needs a win to have any chance of advancing.

IRN-NZL.summary: Iran needs a win to guarantee top-two qualification. New Zealand needs a win to have any chance of advancing.

FRA-SEN.summary: France is already qualified and seeks to win the group. Senegal is eliminated and plays for pride.

IRQ-NOR.summary: Norway is already qualified and seeks to win the group. Iraq is eliminated and plays for pride.

ARG-ALG.summary: Argentina needs a win or draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Algeria needs a win for automatic qualification.

AUT-JOR.summary: Austria needs a win for automatic qualification or a strong third-place finish; Jordan is already eliminated.

POR-COD.summary: Portugal is already qualified for the knockout stage; Congo DR must win to have any chance at a best-third spot.

ENG-CRO.summary: England needs a draw to guarantee top-two qualification; Croatia must win for automatic advancement, a draw offers best-third hope.

GHA-PAN.summary: Ghana needs a draw to guarantee top-two qualification; Panama is already eliminated from the World Cup.

UZB-COL.summary: Uzbekistan is already eliminated from the World Cup; Colombia is already qualified for the knockout stage.

CZE-RSA.summary: South Africa qualified automatically in second place. Czechia finished last with one point and is eliminated.

SUI-BIH.summary: Switzerland qualified automatically in first place. Bosnia-Herzegovina finished third with four points, a strong best-3rd contender.

CAN-QAT.summary: Canada qualified automatically in second place. Qatar finished last with one point and is eliminated.

MEX-KOR.summary: Mexico qualified automatically in first place. South Korea finished third with three points and is eliminated.

USA-AUS.summary: USA is qualified, playing for group winner. Australia needs a win or draw to secure top-2 or a strong third-place finish.

SCO-MAR.summary: Morocco has qualified for the knockout stage. Scotland finished third, unlikely to advance as a best third-place team.

BRA-HAI.summary: Brazil has qualified as group winner. Haiti finished last with zero points, thus eliminated from the tournament.

TUR-PAR.summary: Türkiye is eliminated. Paraguay needs a win or draw to secure top-2 or a strong third-place finish.

NED-SWE.summary: Netherlands needs a win or draw for top-two. Sweden needs a win; a draw likely advances, loss risks elimination.

GER-CIV.summary: Germany qualified. Ivory Coast needs a win or draw for top-two; a loss makes qualification dependent.

ECU-CUW.summary: Both Ecuador and Curaçao need a win to have any chance of advancing. A draw or loss means elimination.

TUN-JPN.summary: Japan needs a win or draw to guarantee top-two qualification. Tunisia is already eliminated from contention.

ESP-KSA.summary: Spain is already qualified for the knockout stage. Saudi Arabia must win to have any chance of advancing as a best third-place team.

BEL-IRN.summary: Both Belgium and Iran need a win to guarantee top-two qualification. A draw or loss risks elimination for either team.

URU-CPV.summary: Both Uruguay and Cape Verde need a win to guarantee top-two qualification. A draw or loss risks elimination for either team.

NZL-EGY.summary: Egypt is already qualified for the knockout stage. New Zealand must win to have any chance of advancing as second or a best third-place team.

ARG-AUT.summary: Argentina is qualified, aiming for first. Austria needs points to secure automatic qualification or a strong third-place spot.

FRA-IRQ.summary: France is qualified, competing for first place. Iraq is eliminated and cannot advance further in the tournament.

NOR-SEN.summary: Norway is qualified, competing for first place. Senegal is eliminated and cannot advance further in the tournament.

JOR-ALG.summary: Jordan is eliminated and cannot advance. Algeria needs a win or draw to secure automatic qualification or a strong third-place spot.

POR-UZB.summary: Portugal needs a win to guarantee top-two. Uzbekistan is eliminated from top-two, needing a win for a slim best-third spot.

ENG-GHA.summary: England and Ghana both need a draw to guarantee top-two. A loss for either risks dropping to third place.

PAN-CRO.summary: Croatia needs a win for top-two, a draw for third. Panama is eliminated from top-two, needing a win for a slim best-third.

COL-COD.summary: Colombia is qualified, playing for group winner. Congo DR needs a win for a best-third chance; a draw or loss eliminates them.
